svg.title: CapsWriter TUI workflow / CapsWriter TUI 操作流程
svg.desc: From a hash-locked Python environment, configure the local API and run health, readiness, and model diagnostics. When ready, choose a file or optional microphone, submit a bounded cancellable transcription, review the response, and save atomically. Failed diagnostics loop through repair; cancellation closes the request and cleans private temporary audio. / 從雜湊鎖定的 Python 環境開始，設定本機 API 並檢查健康、就緒與模型狀態。就緒後選擇檔案或選用麥克風，送出有界且可取消的轉錄，檢查結果後原子儲存。診斷失敗會進入修正迴圈；取消時會關閉請求並清理私有暫存音訊。
svg.text: CapsWriter TUI workflow / CapsWriter TUI 操作流程

text.tspan: 以雜湊鎖定依賴建立隔離環境
設定 API 根網址與僅存記憶體的金鑰
選擇檔案或選用麥克風
Ctrl+T：有界且可取消的轉錄請求

svg.text: The API key is masked and never written by the TUI; recordings stay in a private temporary directory until upload, cancellation, replacement, or exit. / TUI 會遮罩金鑰且不寫入磁碟；錄音只留在私有暫存目錄，並於上傳、取消、取代或離開時清理。
